intro: Ilysanthes hyssopioides, also known as Ilysanthes or Blue Buttonflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to Australia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Ilysanthes hyssopioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
